title: Production source code missing from archive — src/main does not exist
evidence: Only src/test/ exists (5 files, 691 LOC); no src/main/java directory. Tests import com.braziliansoccer.mcp.data.DataLoader, com.braziliansoccer.mcp.tools.MatchTools, com.braziliansoccer.mcp.model.Match, etc. but these classes are absent from the archive. retort.db test_coverage=1.0 confirms code existed at scoring time.
suggestion: Re-archive from the original workspace to include src/main; prior evaluation cited 9 source files / 1560 LOC that are now gone

title: MCP server entrypoint not verifiable — source missing from archive
evidence: pom.xml:108 declares mainClass=com.braziliansoccer.mcp.BrazilianSoccerMcpServer; MCP SDK dependency at pom.xml:28 (io.modelcontextprotocol.sdk:mcp:0.10.0). Server class not present in archive. test_coverage=1.0 suggests it compiled.
suggestion: Re-archive to include src/main; pom.xml and test structure suggest MCP server was implemented

title: Data loading from data/kaggle/ not verifiable — DataLoader class missing
evidence: DataLoaderTest.java:4 imports com.braziliansoccer.mcp.data.DataLoader; tests load 6 CSVs (loadBrasileiraoMatches, loadCopaDoBrasilMatches, loadLibertadoresMatches, loadExtendedMatches, loadHistoricalMatches, loadPlayers). test_coverage=1.0 but source absent.
suggestion: Re-archive to verify DataLoader implementation reads CSV files from data/kaggle/

title: Match query by team not verifiable — MatchTools class missing
evidence: MatchToolsTest.java:56 calls matchTools.searchMatches("Palmeiras", 2022, null, null, null, null); test passes (test_coverage=1.0) but MatchTools.java absent from archive.

title: Date range and season filter not verifiable — source missing
evidence: MatchToolsTest.java:102 calls searchMatches(null, null, null, "2019-01-01", "2019-12-31", 50); season filter tested at line 56 with season=2022. test_coverage=1.0 but implementation absent.
suggestion: Re-archive to verify date range and season filtering in MatchTools

title: Competition filter not verifiable — source missing
evidence: MatchToolsTest.java:68 filters by "Brasileirao"; line 80 filters by "Libertadores". Tests pass (test_coverage=1.0) but MatchTools implementation absent from archive.
suggestion: Re-archive to verify competition filtering logic

title: Team W/L/D record and goals not verifiable — TeamTools class missing
evidence: TeamToolsTest.java:43-46 asserts getTeamStats returns 'Record:', 'Goals:', 'Win rate:', 'Home:', 'Away:' fields. test_coverage=1.0 but TeamTools.java absent.

title: Player search by name not verifiable — PlayerTools class missing
evidence: PlayerToolsTest.java:65 calls searchPlayers("Gabriel", ...); line 130 searches "Neymar"; line 152 searches "Ronaldo". test_coverage=1.0 but PlayerTools.java absent.
suggestion: Re-archive to verify PlayerTools.searchPlayers name search

title: Player filter by nationality/club with ratings not verifiable — source missing
evidence: PlayerToolsTest.java:37 filters nationality="Brazil"; line 52 filters club="Flamengo"; line 78 position="ST"; line 90 minOverall=85. Tests assert 'Overall:' in output. test_coverage=1.0 but source absent.
suggestion: Re-archive to verify nationality/club/rating filtering in PlayerTools

title: Season standings calculation not verifiable — source missing
evidence: TeamToolsTest.java:63-73 calls getStandings(2019, "Brasileirao") and asserts 'Pos' or 'Standings' header and Flamengo appears. test_coverage=1.0 but TeamTools.getStandings source absent.
suggestion: Re-archive to verify standings are computed from match results, not hardcoded

title: Aggregate statistical analysis not verifiable — source missing
evidence: TeamToolsTest.java:93 asserts 'Average goals per match' and 'Home wins' from getGlobalStats; MatchToolsTest.java:91 tests getBiggestWins. test_coverage=1.0 but source absent.
suggestion: Re-archive to verify aggregate stats computation

title: Head-to-head records not verifiable — source missing
evidence: MatchToolsTest.java:38 calls headToHead("Flamengo", "Fluminense", null, null); line 113 tests Corinthians vs Palmeiras. Asserts 'wins' and 'Total matches' in output. test_coverage=1.0 but source absent.
suggestion: Re-archive to verify headToHead implementation returns W/L/D between two teams

title: Tests exist but cannot compile without missing production source
evidence: 5 test files, 44 @Test methods, 0 @Disabled/@Ignore: DataLoaderTest(7), MatchToolsTest(10), PlayerToolsTest(10), TeamNameNormalizerTest(7), TeamToolsTest(10). test_coverage=1.0 from retort.db confirms tests passed at scoring time, but archive cannot reproduce.
suggestion: Re-archive with src/main to make tests compilable; test suite is comprehensive if production code is restored
